title: OREGON MOTHERSCARE - 211info
text: MARION COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION OREGON MOTHERSCARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps pregnant people get connected to prenatal care and other resources in their communities. Services include health insurance navigation, such as OHP application assistance, prenatal care appointment scheduling, health education, and community referrals. Referrals can be provided for WIC, dental care, home visiting programs, and other prenatal support services. 3160 Center Street NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Pregnant people Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (503) 373-3781 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 373-3781 Oregon Motherscare Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Marion County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Dental Care Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Navigator Programs * Pregnant Individuals Physician Referrals * Pregnant Individuals Pregnancy Testing Specialized Information and Referral * Pregnant Individuals Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - CACOON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY CHILDHOOD NURSING PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - WOMEN, INFANTS, AND CHILDREN SUPPLEMENTAL NUTRITION PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - TUBERCULOSIS PROGRAM SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - VACCINES AND IMMUNIZATION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MARION COUNTY PUBLIC HEALTH DIVISION
